{"acceptance_criteria":["Tests cover stale cache behavior after an update: an old cached value is not returned once source data changes and invalidation/update logic runs.","Tests cover the cache miss path: absent keys/data flow through the intended miss behavior and storage access without falsely reporting a hit.","No production cache API changes are introduced in `src/cache.js` or `src/cache-storage.js`.","`npm test` passes.","`npm run coverage:contract` passes."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Cache Invalidation Regression Tests

## Goal
Add focused regression coverage for cache invalidation behavior while leaving the already-correct production cache implementation unchanged.

## Scope
Update `test/cache.test.js` to cover stale cache invalidation after updates and the cache miss path. Production files may be inspected for behavior but should not be changed unless tests reveal an actual defect.

## Non-Goals
Do not refactor cache APIs, change storage contracts, or make unrelated production changes.

## Validation
Run `npm test` and `npm run coverage:contract` after the test changes.","risks":["Tests may accidentally assert implementation details instead of public cache behavior.","Coverage contract may require specific line or branch coverage in `src/cache.js` or `src/cache-storage.js`, so tests should be aligned with the existing contract script.","Production files are listed as likely inspection targets, but edits there should be avoided unless a real bug is proven."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Add or update tests in `test/cache.test.js` for stale cached data after an update/invalidation.","Add or update tests in `test/cache.test.js` for the cache miss path.","Avoid unrelated API or production behavior changes in `src/cache.js` and `src/cache-storage.js`.","Verify with `npm test`.","Verify with `npm run coverage:contract`."],"description":"Inspect the existing cache behavior and coverage contract, then add focused regression tests in `test/cache.test.js` for stale cache invalidation after update and cache miss behavior. Production cache files should remain unchanged unless the new tests expose a genuine defect.","id":"test-cache-invalidation-regression","likely_files":["test/cache.test.js","src/cache.js","src/cache-storage.js","scripts/check-test-coverage-contract.js"],"title":"Add cache invalidation regression tests","validation_commands":["npm test","npm run coverage:contract"]}]}
